summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Speakking structured function calling features (reportCorrection and displayVocabularyHints). All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chat returns structured 'corrections' array when student makes translation error
Backend: POST /api/chat returns structured 'vocabulary' array with every response
Backend: POST /api/chat response has clean 'response' text without [CORRECTION] or [VOCABULARY] JSON blocks
Backend: Corrections array has correct structure: original, correction, explanation, turkish
Backend: Vocabulary array has correct structure: word, meaning, example
Backend: Corrections are saved to lesson session in MongoDB (verified via /api/lessons/history)
Backend: /api/voice/chat endpoint exists and accepts requests
Backend: Admin endpoints still work (sentences, documents, ai-config)
Frontend: LessonSession sidebar shows 'Kelime Ipuclari' (Vocabulary Hints) section with VocabularyCard components
Frontend: LessonSession sidebar shows 'Duzeltmeler' (Corrections) section with CorrectionCard components
Frontend: CorrectionCard shows turkish sentence, user's original answer, correct translation, and explanation
Frontend: VocabularyCard shows word, meaning in Turkish, and example sentence
Frontend: Session summary modal shows stats (vocabulary count, corrections count, messages count) when session ends
Frontend: Admin Dashboard tabs still work (Mufredat, Cumle Bankasi, Dokumanlar, AI Egitimi, Kullanicilar, Ayarlar)
Frontend: Hint Helper (Ipucu Yardimcisi) component visible in lesson sidebar
Frontend: Turkish localization throughout the application
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing scenarios and admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structured function calling is fully implemented. Backend parse_structured_response() extracts [CORRECTION] and [VOCABULARY] JSON blocks from AI response and returns them as separate arrays. Frontend LessonSession.js has CorrectionCard and VocabularyCard components that display the structured data in the sidebar. To trigger a correction, send a deliberately wrong English translation like 'I am go school every day'. The AI will detect the error and return a correction with original, correction, explanation, and turkish fields. Vocabulary hints are returned with every response containing word, meaning, and example fields.

reportCorrection.description: When AI detects translation errors, it returns structured correction data with original, correction, explanation, and turkish fields
reportCorrection.trigger: Send wrong translation like 'I am go school every day'

displayVocabularyHints.description: Every AI response includes vocabulary array with word, meaning, and example fields
displayVocabularyHints.display: VocabularyCard components in sidebar show vocabulary hints

cleanResponseText.description: Response text is clean without [CORRECTION] or [VOCABULARY] JSON blocks

sessionSummaryModal.description: Shows vocabulary count, corrections count, and messages count when session ends
